cards.name: 8 of Wands
cards.interpretation: movement, speed, progress, quick decisions, sudden changes, excitement

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality

cards.name: 8 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: stagnation, monotony, accepting less, avoidance, fear of change, staying in bad situation
